suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'initialProject.a11yReport', 'initialProject.code', 'initialProject.intent', 'initialProject.timestamp', and 'versions'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'setVersions' needs the current value of 'initialProject.timestamp', you can also switch to useReducer instead of useState and read 'initialProject.timestamp' in the reducer.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [initialProject.a11yReport, initialProject.code, initialProject.id, initialProject.intent, initialProject.timestamp, versions]
